GPU0	GPU1	GPU2	GPU3	NIC0	NIC1	NIC2	NIC3	CPU Affinity	NUMA Affinity	GPU NUMA ID
GPU0	 X 	NV8	NV8	NV8	SYS	SYS	NODE	PXB	64-127,192-254	1		N/A
GPU1	NV8	 X 	NV8	NV8	SYS	SYS	NODE	PXB	64-127,192-254	1		N/A
GPU2	NV8	NV8	 X 	NV8	SYS	SYS	PXB	NODE	64-127,192-254	1		N/A
GPU3	NV8	NV8	NV8	 X 	SYS	SYS	PXB	NODE	64-127,192-254	1		N/A
NIC0	SYS	SYS	SYS	SYS	 X 	NODE	SYS	SYS				
NIC1	SYS	SYS	SYS	SYS	NODE	 X 	SYS	SYS				
NIC2	NODE	NODE	PXB	PXB	SYS	SYS	 X 	NODE				
NIC3	PXB	PXB	NODE	NODE	SYS	SYS	NODE	 X 				

Legend:

  X    = Self
  SYS  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the SMP interconnect between NUMA nodes (e.g., QPI/UPI)
  NODE = Connection traversing PCIe as well as the interconnect between PCIe Host Bridges within a NUMA node
  PHB  = Connection traversing PCIe as well as a PCIe Host Bridge (typically the CPU)
  PXB  = Connection traversing multiple PCIe bridges (without traversing the PCIe Host Bridge)
  PIX  = Connection traversing at most a single PCIe bridge
  NV#  = Connection traversing a bonded set of # NVLinks

NIC Legend:

  NIC0: mlx5_0
  NIC1: mlx5_1
  NIC2: mlx5_2
  NIC3: mlx5_3
